description.en: Audit the EduTrack enrollments table in Supabase: write 12 SQL queries (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, GROUP BY, HAVING) and document the real findings in a Markdown analysis report.
description.es: Audita la tabla de inscripciones de EduTrack en Supabase: escribe 12 consultas SQL (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, GROUP BY, HAVING) y documenta los hallazgos reales en un informe de análisis en Markdown.

sharing.en: I just completed the EduTrack Data Audit with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy: 12 SQL queries on Supabase plus a written analysis report. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/edutrack-data-audit-sql #SQL #Supabase #DataAnalysis #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy
